headline: Tradr's 2X Short Leveraged ETFs on AAOI and ORCL Begin Trading
summary: Tradr ETFs, a provider of ETFs designed for sophisticated investors and professional traders, today launched two new leveraged ETFs on the stocks of Applied Optoelectronics and Oracle Corporation.  The Cboe-listed funds seek to deliver two times short (-200%) the daily performance of their underlying target stocks.

headline: Canadian Manganese Appoints GreenMet as Strategic Development and Capital Formation Partner for the North American Critical Manganese Alliance, an Initiative Targeting Up To US $1 Billion in Long-Term Capital Commitments
summary: Toronto, Ontario and Washington, D.C.--(Newsfile Corp. - July 15, 2026) - Canadian Manganese Company Inc. (CBOE CA: CDMN) ("Canadian Manganese" or "CMC") and GreenMet Inc. ("GreenMet") are pleased to announce the execution of a Strategic Development and Capital Formation Letter of Intent, appointing GreenMet as the exclusive Strategic Development and Capital Formation Partner for the North American Critical Manganese Alliance ("NACMA").Under the Letter of Intent, GreenMet will lead the...

headline: Glass House Brands Announces the Filing of an Updated At-The-Market Distribution Program
summary: LONG BEACH, Calif. and TORONTO, July 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Glass House Brands Inc. ("Glass House" or the "Company") (CBOE CA: GLAS.A.U) (NYSE: GLAS) today announced that it has updated its at-the-market distribution program (the "ATM Program"), pursuant to which the Company may, from time to time, sell up to US$100 million of its equity shares (the "Equity Shares"). headline: How to Protect Against an August Volatility Spike
summary: Market volatility has dropped slightly in recent weeks as measured by the CBOE Volatility (VIX) Index. VIX is a real-time index that represents the market expectation for near-term volatility in the S&P500 index.

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on Cboe Global Markets, Lowers Price Target to $320
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Patrick Moley   maintains Cboe Global Markets (BATS:CBOE) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $355 to $320.
